title: task
description:
The /status/queues CoAP endpoint (project-LICHEN-bis0.2) is implemented but returns placeholder zeros. This task integrates actual queue statistics from the L2 tx_queue into the endpoint.

Work required:
1. Add lichen_hal_queue_stats_get() or similar HAL function to expose tx_queue stats
2. The L2 layer needs to either use tx_queue or expose its internal queue stats
3. Update get_queue_stats() in gateway main.c to fetch real stats
4. avg_latency_ms is not tracked by tx_queue - need to add or omit

Reference: spec/appendix-bufferbloat.md, tx_queue.h struct tx_queue_stats
close_reason: Fixed: Integrated tx_queue into lora_l2.c for bufferbloat avoidance. Updated lichen_lora_l2_tx() to use the queue (push/pop). Added lichen_lora_l2_queue_stats_get() to expose stats. Updated gateway /status/queues endpoint to call real queue stats. avg_latency_ms left as 0 (not tracked by tx_queue).
